reason: Environment definitions, persistence, bridge requests, store state, and Vue rendering must remain contract-compatible across every boundary.
Pinia owns bridge results, cross-view configuration, per-item refresh state, and stale-result protection.
Shared environment models and the preload bridge contract must be represented once in src/types.ts and validated at entry boundaries.
Settings and environment UI must follow existing Vue, accessibility, skeleton, semantic status, and dialog conventions.
